fields.label: Title
fields.description: Auto-generated from the first user message; editable.

fields.label: Openclaw Session Key
fields.description: Populated on first agent turn; reused for subsequent turns in this conversation.

fields.label: Model Override
fields.description: Bare model id (no provider prefix) used for chat turns in this conversation. Null/empty falls back to Jarvis Settings.llm_model. Validated against the SUBSCRIPTION_MODELS allowlist at write time.

fields.label: Thinking Effort
fields.description: Per-conversation reasoning effort sent to openclaw via an inline /think directive in the user message. Empty falls back to openclaw's default (medium). Maps to the Fast/Balanced/Deep UI selector.

fields.label: Auto-apply changes (skip confirmation)
fields.description: When 1, reversible mutating tool calls in this conversation execute without a confirmation card. Enabling requires the System Manager role; destructive ops (delete/cancel/amend/send_email) still park regardless. Default 0 (confirm every write).

fields.label: File Box conversation (directed inbound run)
fields.description: Set by the File Box drop path. When 1, reversible create/update tool calls execute directly (no confirmation card) because the run is unattended and review happens on the created Draft + the approval board; destructive ops still park. Server-set only; enabling via a generic save requires System Manager, like auto_apply.
